title: No environmental fog / volumetric fog
body:
### This pack is incompatable with sodium

This resource pack removes the environmental fog / volumetric fog added in 1.21.6

Check out my other resource pack [Restore the Classics](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/restore-the-classics) that adds other tweaks 

The reason I split Restore the Classics and this project is because I do not know of a way to do this with sodium and I want Restore the Classics to work with sodium.
